what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, pointing to a specific image asset by URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-2508ef1e.
The channel is design-assets and the attachment_type is images.
standouts: References a logo image asset via an image:// URI.
Serves as a ledger-style attachment record in channel-memory.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured attachment metadata.
Includes standard ledger fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added.
The target field uses a custom image:// URI scheme.
concerns: The target URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
There is no caption, title, or description for the attachment.
No provenance, author, checksum, or file-size information is recorded.
notes: A minimal channel-memory attachment entry that registers a logo image asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: What image format and resolution does the target URI resolve to?
Who added this attachment and for what specific purpose?
Is the image:// URI stable and retrievable by consumers of this ledger?
How does this logo variant relate to other logo assets in the channel?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment, and that is exactly what the file does.
intention_signals: It appears to register a specific logo image in the design-assets channel so the asset can be referenced, discovered, and tracked over time.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer to a design image asset within a channel ledger, supporting asset retrieval and provenance tracking.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record for the design-assets channel that identifies an image asset at image://design-assets/logo/Icon_ConceptV_Logo_Black and records when it was added.
intention_for_embedding: This record was created to catalog a logo image attachment in the design-assets channel.
